---
title: "Analytics Dashboard"
author: "Author Name"
format: dashboard
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(gt)
library(DT)
library(plotly)
library(bslib)
library(bsicons)

# Set theme
theme_set(theme_minimal())

# Load data (using mtcars for demonstration)
data <- mtcars %>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "model") %>%
  as_tibble()

# Calculate KPIs
total_vehicles <- nrow(data)
avg_mpg <- mean(data$mpg)
avg_hp <- mean(data$hp)
avg_weight <- mean(data$wt)
```

# Overview {orientation="columns"}

## Column {width="25%"}

```{r}
#| title: Total Vehicles

value_box(
  title = "Total Vehicles",
  value = total_vehicles,
  showcase = bs_icon("car-front-fill"),
  theme = "primary"
)
```

```{r}
#| title: Average MPG

value_box(
  title = "Avg Fuel Efficiency",
  value = scales::number(avg_mpg, accuracy = 0.1),
  showcase = bs_icon("fuel-pump"),
  theme = "success"
)
```

```{r}
#| title: Average Horsepower

value_box(
  title = "Avg Horsepower",
  value = scales::number(avg_hp, accuracy = 1),
  showcase = bs_icon("speedometer"),
  theme = "warning"
)
```

```{r}
#| title: Average Weight

value_box(
  title = "Avg Weight (1000 lbs)",
  value = scales::number(avg_weight, accuracy = 0.1),
  showcase = bs_icon("truck"),
  theme = "info"
)
```

## Column {width="75%"}

### Row {height="60%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Fuel Efficiency vs Weight"
#| padding: 10px

p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = wt, y = mpg, color = as.factor(cyl))) +
  geom_point(aes(size = hp, text = model), alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1", name = "Cylinders") +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "Horsepower") +
  labs(
    x = "Weight (1000 lbs)",
    y = "Miles Per Gallon"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggplotly(p, tooltip = c("text", "x", "y"))
```

### Row {height="40%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Distribution by Cylinders"

cyl_summary <- data %>%
  count(cyl) %>%
  mutate(percentage = n / sum(n) * 100)

plot_ly(cyl_summary,
        labels = ~paste(cyl, "cyl"),
        values = ~n,
        type = "pie",
        textposition = "inside",
        textinfo = "label+percent",
        marker = list(colors = c("#E74C3C", "#3498DB", "#2ECC71"))) %>%
  layout(showlegend = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| title: "Performance Metrics"

data %>%
  group_by(cyl) %>%
  summarise(
    Count = n(),
    `Avg MPG` = mean(mpg),
    `Avg HP` = mean(hp),
    `Avg Weight` = mean(wt)
  ) %>%
  gt() %>%
  fmt_number(columns = c(`Avg MPG`, `Avg HP`, `Avg Weight`), decimals = 1) %>%
  cols_label(cyl = "Cylinders") %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "#F8F9FA"),
    locations = cells_body()
  ) %>%
  opt_row_striping()
```

# Performance Analysis {orientation="rows"}

## Row {height="50%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Horsepower Distribution"

ggplot(data, aes(x = hp, fill = as.factor(cyl))) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 20, alpha = 0.7, position = "identity") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1", name = "Cylinders") +
  labs(
    x = "Horsepower",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
#| title: "Quarter Mile Time vs Horsepower"

p2 <- ggplot(data, aes(x = hp, y = qsec, color = as.factor(cyl))) +
  geom_point(aes(size = wt, text = model), alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1", name = "Cylinders") +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "Weight") +
  labs(
    x = "Horsepower",
    y = "Quarter Mile Time (sec)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ggplotly(p2, tooltip = c("text", "x", "y"))
```

## Row {height="50%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Performance Comparison by Engine Type"

data %>%
  mutate(
    cyl = as.factor(cyl),
    transmission = ifelse(am == 1, "Manual", "Automatic")
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = cyl, y = hp, fill = transmission)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#3498DB", "#E74C3C"), name = "Transmission") +
  labs(
    x = "Number of Cylinders",
    y = "Horsepower"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
#| title: "Fuel Efficiency Trends"

data %>%
  arrange(wt) %>%
  mutate(vehicle_id = row_number()) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = vehicle_id, y = mpg)) +
  geom_line(color = "#2C3E50", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(color = as.factor(cyl)), size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1", name = "Cylinders") +
  labs(
    x = "Vehicle Index (ordered by weight)",
    y = "Miles Per Gallon"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

# Data Table {orientation="columns"}

## Column

```{r}
#| title: "Complete Vehicle Data"
#| padding: 10px

data %>%
  select(model, mpg, cyl, hp, wt, qsec, am) %>%
  mutate(
    am = ifelse(am == 1, "Manual", "Automatic"),
    mpg = round(mpg, 1),
    hp = round(hp, 0),
    wt = round(wt, 2),
    qsec = round(qsec, 2)
  ) %>%
  datatable(
    options = list(
      pageLength = 15,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      columnDefs = list(
        list(className = "dt-center", targets = "_all")
      )
    ),
    colnames = c(
      "Model", "MPG", "Cylinders", "Horsepower",
      "Weight", "Quarter Mile", "Transmission"
    ),
    filter = "top",
    class = "display"
  ) %>%
  formatStyle(
    "mpg",
    background = styleColorBar(data$mpg, "#2ECC71"),
    backgroundSize = "100% 90%",
    backgroundRepeat = "no-repeat",
    backgroundPosition = "center"
  ) %>%
  formatStyle(
    "hp",
    background = styleColorBar(data$hp, "#E74C3C"),
    backgroundSize = "100% 90%",
    backgroundRepeat = "no-repeat",
    backgroundPosition = "center"
  )
```
